title: Add the invariants.toml schema and config-time loader
description:
Add `.jit/invariants.toml` as a registry-first source: a declarative registry whose entries each carry a `statement`, a `kind` of `enforced` or `advisory`, and an optional `enforced-by` binding to a rule or gate. Add a new `invariants.rs` module mirroring `RuleSet::load` (`crates/jit/src/validation/rules.rs:902`) and load the registry at config time on BOTH return paths of `JitConfig::load` (`crates/jit/src/config.rs:432-451` and `:474`), so invariants load even when no `config.toml` is present.

## Success Criteria

- [hard] REQ-01: An entry declaring `statement`, `kind` (`enforced`|`advisory`), and optional `enforced-by` is loaded at config time.
- [hard] REQ-02: Invariants load on both config-load return paths, including when `config.toml` is absent.
- [hard] REQ-03: An invalid invariant entry fails config load with a typed, descriptive error.
- [hard] REQ-04: The loader is covered by `cargo test`.
